notes_md:
**tinh** = essence, the core or most refined part of something. On its own, it’s rarely used in conversation; you’ll mostly see it inside compound words.

As a noun element, it shows up in words like **tinh thần** (spirit), **tinh túy** (essence/best part), **tinh dầu** (essential oil), **tinh chất** (extract/serum). It gives the idea of something pure, concentrated, or fundamental.

As an adjective, **tinh** can mean sharp or perceptive (like sharp eyes or ears), or pure/refined depending on the word it combines with. Think of it as “refined to the core.”

content.sentence: Cô ấy rất ___ khi nấu ăn.

translation.en: She is very skilled at cooking.

exampleSentences: Anh muốn hiểu rõ tinh của vấn đề này để giải quyết tốt hơn.
Nước hoa này có mùi tinh rất đặc biệt và cuốn hút.
Trong mỗi câu chuyện, em luôn cố gắng cảm nhận tinh của thông điệp.
notes:
tinh = essence, the core or most refined part of something. On its own, it’s rarely used in conversation; you’ll mostly see it inside compound words.

As a noun element, it shows up in words like tinh thần (spirit), tinh túy (essence/best part), tinh dầu (essential oil), tinh chất (extract/serum). It gives the idea of something pure, concentrated, or fundamental.

As an adjective, tinh can mean sharp or perceptive (like sharp eyes or ears), or pure/refined depending on the word it combines with. Think of it as “refined to the core.”

definitions.vi: Phần cốt lõi hoặc tinh túy nhất của một cái gì đó.
definitions.en: The core or most refined part of something.
definitions.es: La parte central hoặc más refinada của algo.

example.en: This perfume has a very special essence.
example.vi: Loại nước hoa này có một mùi tinh rất đặc biệt.
example.es: Este perfume tiene una esencia muy especial.

exampleSentencesTranslated: I want to understand the essence of this problem to solve it better.
This perfume has a very special and attractive essence.
In every story, I always try to feel the essence of the message.

content.sentence: Anh ấy đang nghiên cứu ___ dầu sả.

translation.en: He is studying lemongrass essential oil.
